title: SkyrimNet Trigger
description: A YAML rule that watches for a game event and emits a response (dialogue, narration, diary entry, etc.). Shape matches SkyrimNet's WORKFLOW_TRIGGERS.md. This schema is syntactic only — semantic validation (real eventType names, valid schemaCondition field paths for the declared eventType) runs inside the dashboard via SkyrimNet's own validate_custom_trigger at publish time.

name.description: snake_case identifier for this trigger. Must start with a lowercase letter.

description.description: Human-readable description of when this trigger fires and what it does.

eventType.description: Game event type. Common values from SkyrimNet: spell_cast, active_effect, hit, combat, death, activation, equip, sleep_start, sleep_stop, book_read, quest_stage, quest_start_stop, location_change, container_changed, enter_bleedout, animation_event, mod_event, crime, dragon_soul, dialogue, or '*' for wildcard. SkyrimNet may add more — this field is not restricted to an enum for forward compatibility. Real validity is checked by validate_custom_trigger at publish time.

schemaConditions.description: Filters on the event's extraData fields. All conditions must pass (AND).

fieldPath.description: Dot-path into the event's extraData (e.g. 'event_name', 'sender_form_id', 'num_arg'). Available paths vary by eventType.

operator.description: Comparison operator. Numeric operators require numeric values; string operators require string values.

value.description: Scalar value to compare against. Inja template strings like '{{ player_name }}' are allowed.

type.description: Kind of response generated when the trigger matches. player_thought = internal monologue, player_dialogue = player speaks aloud, direct_narration = narrative text NPCs react to, persistent_generic = log event without dialogue, diary_entry = create a diary entry, dynamic_bio_update = update character biography.

content.description: Inja template string. Available variables: {{ player_name }}, {{ player.name }}, {{ event_json.FIELD }}, {{ time_desc }}, {{ location }}, {{ gameTimeStr }}.

targetScope.description: Required for diary_entry and dynamic_bio_update. Who the diary/bio update applies to.

nearbyRadius.description: Optional. Radius in game units for 'nearby' scopes (default 2000).

audience.description: Who perceives the response. Default: player. originator = actor that caused the event, target = target of the event, nearby_npcs = NPCs only (excludes player).

enabled.description: If false, the trigger is skipped entirely. Default: true.

probability.description: Chance per matching event that the response actually fires (0.0 to 1.0). Default: 1.0.

cooldownSeconds.description: Minimum seconds between fires for this trigger. Default: 0.

priority.description: Ordering hint when multiple triggers match the same event. Higher fires first.
